content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Floor Number". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1426/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. Each test case contains an integer N, the floor number.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the floor number.

code.Python3:
T = int(input())
for _ in range(T):
    N = int(input())
    print(N)
